strategy: spot long plus equal-notional perpetual short funding carry

discipline.execution: funding signal at event t; fill at next aligned event t+1
discipline.costs: spot and perpetual legs both pay fee and slippage on entry and exit
discipline.funding: settled on each held funding event by short-perpetual direction
discipline.multiple_testing: predeclared parameter grid included in Benjamini-Hochberg FDR
discipline.oos: last 30% locked out-of-sample after in-sample walk-forward
discipline.safety: read-only; no live trading, orders, wallet, or account path
